parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'start_at', start_at,
        'end_at', end_at,
        'status', status
      )
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS busy_events
FROM public.appointments
WHERE status IN ('confirmed', 'pending')
  AND start_at < '{{ $json.search_end_at }}'::timestamptz
  AND end_at > '{{ $json.search_start_at }}'::timestamptz;

SELECT
  COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'start_at', start_at,
        'end_at', end_at,
        'status', status
      )
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS busy_events
FROM public.appointments
WHERE status IN ('confirmed', 'pending')
  AND start_at < '{{ $json.search_end_at }}'::timestamptz
  AND end_at > '{{ $json.search_start_at }}'::timestamptz;
